headline: Right to information law covers only 2 states
context: As of 2025, only Selangor and Penang have enacted freedom of information laws, leaving the federal level and 11 states without right to information legislation.

cards.big: Only 2 of 13 states have freedom of information laws, no federal FOI exists
cards.sub: Selangor FOI 2011 and Penang FOI 2010 remain the only transparency laws

cards.big: Official Secrets Act 1972 classifies government documents broadly as secret
cards.sub: OSA criminalises disclosure with penalties up to 7 years imprisonment

cards.big: Article 10 does not explicitly include right to information
cards.sub: 119 countries worldwide have enacted FOI legislation as of 2025

cards.big: Selangor FOI received 1,200 requests in 2024 showing strong public demand
cards.sub: Federal government transparency relies entirely on voluntary disclosure

cards.big: A democracy where citizens cannot access government information is incomplete
Centre to Combat Corruption and Cronyism drafted federal FOI bill in 2023
